title: Brackit 2,000 Piece Nail Assortment Set with Storage Case – Including Wire Nails, Brad Nails & Tacks - For DIY, Craft, Masonry, Woodwork, Décor
features: HIGH QUALITY: Our strong and sturdy zinc plated nails are rust and corrosion resistant and designed to bring you reliable and durable long term use

GREAT VALUE: Our assorted nail set consists of 2000 pieces including 560 wire brad nails (19, 25, 38mm), 1,120 wire nails (15, 19, 25, 32, 38, 63mm) and 320 tacks (12 & 15mm) which will save you time and money as by buying your nails and brads in bulk you’ll always have the size you need at hand

CONVENIENT STORAGE: Our set comes in a handy solid plastic carry case with 11 compartments so your nails are organised fir whenever you need them. It also features a clear lid so you can view your nail and brad kit without opening it

MULTIPURPOSE: Our versatile assortment has multiple uses as it can be used for hanging pictures, mirrors and other home décor or DIY jobs, construction, renovation, woodworking and carrying out repairs. Suitable for wood & masonry, drywall panels and doors

VERSATILE: Our great quality kit with nails and brads is perfect for everyone from beginners to DIY enthusiasts. It makes a great gift for anyone who loves to build and fix things and is also ideal for anyone looking to extend their tool set
description: From the brand Previous page MASKING TAPE PRECISION FINISH: At Brackit we recognize that a roll of masking tape is an essential tool that shouldn’t fail. We aim to give you that precision finish every time whether you’re painting a wall or windows edges through the perfect combination of adhesion and quality of crepe paper to construct the right masking tape so you can work with confidence.
